ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to the Claude CLI binary. Leave blank to auto-detect.
ast.target: Claude CLI 二进制文件的路径。留空则自动检测。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Press Enter to send. Shift+Enter always inserts a newline.
ast.target: 按 Enter 键发送。Shift+Enter 始终插入换行符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically resume the most recent session when the panel opens.
ast.target: 面板打开时自动恢复最近的会话。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated extensions for @-mention search (e.g. md, pdf, txt). Use * to match all file types. Add a trailing comma to also include files with no extension.
ast.target: 用于 @提及搜索的逗号分隔扩展名（例如 md, pdf, txt）。使用 * 匹配所有文件类型。添加尾随逗号以同时包含无扩展名的文件。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative path to the context file injected at session start.
ast.target: 会话开始时注入的上下文文件的保险库相对路径。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How many levels of your vault folder/file tree to include at the start of each session. This gives Claude a map of your vault structure (names only — no file contents are read). Deeper trees cost more tokens on the first message of each session. "Off" disables the tree entirely.
ast.target: 在每个会话开始时包含您的保险库文件夹/文件树的层级数。这为 Claude 提供了您的保险库结构图（仅名称 — 不读取文件内容）。更深的树在每个会话的第一条消息上消耗更多令牌。\"关闭\"将完全禁用树状结构。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When your context file exceeds this token count, Claude is instructed to compact it before the session ends — summarizing redundant entries and dropping outdated observations. Set to 0 to disable. Typical context files stay well under 4 000 tokens; set a limit if yours grows large over time.
ast.target: 当您的上下文文件超过此令牌数时，Claude 会在会话结束前被指示压缩它 — 总结冗余条目并丢弃过时的观察。设置为 0 以禁用。典型的上下文文件远低于 4000 个令牌；如果您的文件随时间增长变大，请设置一个限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skip all context injection — no orientation, vault tree, context file, or active note. Reduces session start cost to zero. UI Bridge actions (open file, show notice, etc.) and vault queries will not work in this mode. Skills still work.
ast.target: 跳过所有上下文注入 — 无定向、保险库树、上下文文件或活动笔记。将会话启动成本降至零。在此模式下，UI Bridge 操作（打开文件、显示通知等）和保险库查询将不起作用。技能仍然有效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When notes are open side by side in split panes, include all visible file paths in the active note context.
ast.target: 当笔记在分割窗格中并排打开时，将所有可见的文件路径包含在活动笔记上下文中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When multiple notes are open as stacked tabs in the same pane, include all open tab file paths in the active note context.
ast.target: 当多个笔记在同一窗格中作为堆叠标签页打开时，将所有打开的标签页文件路径包含在活动笔记上下文中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Canvas files converted to text and injected as context will be truncated at this character limit. Set to 0 for no limit.
ast.target: 转换为文本并作为上下文注入的画布文件将在此字符限制处截断。设置为 0 表示无限制。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative folder where "export session to vault" saves notes. Created automatically if it does not exist.
ast.target: \"将会话导出到保险库\"保存笔记的保险库相对文件夹。如果不存在则自动创建。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Controls which vault operations Claude is allowed to perform.
ast.target: 控制 Claude 被允许执行哪些保险库操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When off, full access resets to standard when Obsidian restarts.
ast.target: 关闭时，完全访问权限在 Obsidian 重启后重置为标准。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the setup modal on launch when no context file is found. Disable if you prefer to create the file manually.
ast.target: 当未找到上下文文件时，在启动时显示设置模态框。如果您更喜欢手动创建文件，请禁用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow Claude to trigger Obsidian UI actions — open files, show notices, navigate headings. Claude is instructed to use these proactively after completing tasks.
ast.target: 允许 Claude 触发 Obsidian UI 操作 — 打开文件、显示通知、导航标题。Claude 被指示在完成任务后主动使用这些。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When Claude tries to run a command not in the allowlist, show a prompt offering a one-time allow or the option to add it to the allowlist. If off, unlisted commands are hard-blocked with a notice.
ast.target: 当 Claude 尝试运行不在允许列表中的命令时，显示一个提示，提供一次性允许或将其添加到允许列表的选项。如果关闭，未列出的命令将被硬阻止并显示通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Write a debug log file to your vault. Useful for troubleshooting. Takes effect on next Obsidian restart.
ast.target: 将调试日志文件写入您的保险库。用于故障排除。在下次 Obsidian 重启时生效。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Vault-relative path for the log file. Defaults to the plugin folder so it stays out of your vault.
ast.target: 日志文件的保险库相对路径。默认为插件文件夹，以便它不会出现在您的保险库中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Normal logs session events and errors. Verbose adds raw stream data and token breakdowns — useful for deep debugging but produces large log files.
ast.target: 普通日志记录会话事件和错误。详细日志添加原始流数据和令牌分解 — 适用于深度调试，但会产生大型日志文件。

ast.target: BojuBot: 上下文文件生成遇到错误。请检查调试日志。

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: BojuBot: 创建上下文文件失败。请检查调试日志。

ast.target: BojuBot: 设置中已禁用“将技能注册为 Ctrl+P 命令”。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Help Claude generate a more personalised context file. Tell it a little about yourself and how you use this vault.
ast.target: 帮助 Claude 生成更个性化的上下文文件。告诉它一些关于您自己以及您如何使用此保险库的信息。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Add any files Claude should read before generating — e.g. An existing Claude.md, project notes, or style guides.
ast.target: 添加任何 Claude 在生成前应阅读的文件——例如现有的 Claude.md、项目笔记或风格指南。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Compact this session? Earlier messages will be summarized to free up context.
ast.target: 压缩此会话？早期消息将被摘要以释放上下文空间。

ast.name: text
ast.source: BojuBot requires the Claude Code CLI (included with Claude Pro/Max). Follow the steps below, then click Check again.
ast.target: BojuBot 需要 Claude Code CLI（包含在 Claude Pro/Max 中）。请按照以下步骤操作，然后点击“再次检查”。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 步骤 1 — 安装 Claude Code

ast.name: text
ast.source: Open PowerShell (not WSL, not Command Prompt) and run:
ast.target: 打开 PowerShell（非 WSL，非命令提示符）并运行：

ast.name: text
ast.source: This opens a browser window to authenticate with your Claude account (pro or max required):
ast.target: 这将打开一个浏览器窗口，用于通过您的 Claude 账户（需要 Pro 或 Max 订阅）进行身份验证：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Already installed and still seeing this?
ast.target: 已安装但仍看到此提示？

ast.name: text
ast.source: Claude Code may not be on the auto-detected path. Enter the full path to your Claude binary below, then click check again.
ast.target: Claude Code 可能不在自动检测的路径上。请在下方输入您的 Claude 二进制文件的完整路径，然后点击“再次检查”。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Error: Claude Code is not authenticated.

ast.name: text
ast.source: Click Open terminal below. Claude Code will launch and open a browser window to log in. If the browser does not open automatically, press c in the terminal to copy the login URL.
ast.target: 点击下方的“打开终端”。Claude Code 将启动并打开一个浏览器窗口进行登录。如果浏览器未自动打开，请在终端中按 c 复制登录 URL。

ast.name: text
ast.source: A Claude pro or max subscription is required.
ast.target: 需要 Claude Pro 或 Max 订阅。
